scripts.install:backend: cmd /c "if not exist backend\venv (python -m venv backend\venv) && backend\venv\Scripts\pip install -r backend\requirements.txt"
scripts.install-backend: cmd /c "if not exist backend\venv (python -m venv backend\venv) && backend\venv\Scripts\pip install -r backend\requirements.txt"
scripts.install:all: pnpm run install:frontend && pnpm run install:backend
scripts.install-all: pnpm run install:frontend && pnpm run install:backend
scripts.install: pnpm run install:frontend && pnpm run install:backend
scripts.build:backend: echo "No build step required for backend"
scripts.build-backend: echo "No build step required for backend"
